evals.name: High match — accurate timestamp
evals.prompt: Verify that timestamp 45.2s in naati_sample.mp3 matches '我想预约明天下午两点的门诊'

input.text: 我想预约明天下午两点的门诊

evals.expected: match_score ≥ 0.85, diagnosis = HIGH_MATCH, no correction needed

evals.name: Low match — timestamp drift detected
evals.prompt: Verify timestamp 450.0s in long_audio.mp3 matches '我们需要确认一下你的个人信息'

input.text: 我们需要确认一下你的个人信息

evals.expected: match_score < 0.70, diagnosis = LOW_MATCH, suggestion includes search range like [448.0, 452.0]

evals.name: Boundary handling — timestamp near audio start
evals.prompt: Verify timestamp 1.5s with window=2.0 — segment start must not go negative
evals.expected: segment_start = 0.0 (clamped, not negative), no exception thrown, valid segment extracted

evals.name: Silence detection
evals.prompt: Verify a timestamp that falls in a silent gap between sentences
evals.expected: match_score = 0.0, diagnosis = SILENCE, suggestion advises extending window or checking pause

evals.name: Mixed language segment
evals.prompt: Verify timestamp for mixed Chinese/English text '这个是 medical certificate，需要你的签名'

input.text: 这个是 medical certificate，需要你的签名

evals.expected: Handles CJK + English tokenization correctly, no crash, reasonable match score
